title: LiveChat2MC
description:
LiveChat2MC is a Fabric mod that brings YouTube Live Chat directly into your Minecraft game.
See real-time viewer messages inside the in-game chat window, perfect for streamers who want to connect their audience with the gameplay experience.
body:
# LiveChat2MC

Bring your livestream closer to your world.

LiveChat2MC connects your Minecraft chat with live messages from YouTube streams.
Instead of switching screens, you can see the chat directly in-game while you play.

## ✨ Features

* Live YouTube chat displayed inside Minecraft
* Works with `/ytchat start [video_id]` command
* Non-intrusive: messages appear just like regular chat
* Perfect for creators, streamers, and interactive events

## 🎮 Why use it?

Whether you’re streaming to your community or playing with friends, LiveChat2MC makes it easy to keep track of your live audience without missing the action.

## 📦 Requirement

* **Fabric API**: `0.132.0+1.21.8`

### (Optional)

* **Cloth Config**: Used to open the configuration screen (if not present, only the command can be used, and `/ytchat config` will not open the actual GUI).
* **Mod Menu**

## 🧩 About this project

This mod was fully built using **Vibe Coding** and **AI assistance** as a **study case**.
The goal is to explore how modern tools can help creators build real-world mods faster and more efficiently.

* **Open Source**: You can explore the source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/flixzer/livechat2mc)
* **Community Support**: Got questions or ideas? Join our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/cpyXYZArgm)
